understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level by navigating the grid while avoiding hazards, using limited moves and clicks per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts x then applies gravity (falling toward lower/higher y based on direction) until landing; CLICK removes breakable blocks at target [x,y]; spikes end the run on landing; UNDO reverts actions; each level has 2 attempts of 50 turns, with corridor previews showing safe fall paths.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level by navigating the grid while avoiding hazards, using limited moves and clicks per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts x then applies gravity (falling toward lower/higher y based on direction) until landing; CLICK removes breakable blocks at target [x,y]; spikes end the run on landing; UNDO reverts actions; each level has 2 attempts of 50 turns, with corridor previews showing safe fall paths.
